Luna
Start the conversation. Be intentional. 💜
Hey! So glad we connected. How are you finding the community so far?
2:30 PM
It's been great! Love how intentional everyone is here. What circles are you part of?
2:32 PM
I'm in the Toronto poly meetup and the communication skills one. Both are amazing!
2:34 PM
Oh nice! I've been meaning to join the communication skills circle. Is it active?
2:35 PM
Super active! They do weekly discussion threads. You should definitely join 😊
2:36 PM
